title: Edible Boats
description: Makes boats edible by changing apple texture to boat texture
body:
HOW IT WORKS:
- Retextures apple.png to oak_boat.png texture
- Renames item.minecraft.apple in en_us.json (language file) to Boat instead of Apple

  YOU ARE ALLOWED TO DO ANYTHING WITH THE PACK EXCEPT REDISTRIBUTING IT ON OTHER SITES (including modrinth project link is OK)

WORKS ON MINECRAFT 1.20.4 AND UP.

HOW TO INSTALL RESOURCE PACK:

1. Click on Options and then click on Resource Packs
   ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1dc1cb348657eab30fba2732edb5a4ca3a6c5242.png)
2. Then click on Open Pack Folder
   ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b3fe72166073d5ebf658bc62a64f19a9474ad5a.png)
3. KEEP THIS WINDOW OPEN
   ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/220c5550cd7ea71463780471767a52323be28494.png)
4. Right click on Finder icon and click New Finder Window
   ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7865265f942417e8563a2f0b55a69bc562eb68ec.png)
5. Then open your Downloads folder (or where you saved the rp from) and press CMD+C
   ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a3f92a1af46388f6f94cb52f4c574f884db45b6.png)
6. Then go to your resourcepacks folder and press CMD+V
   ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7138a1cd7bc1962ea501b0f8e0d7778e7e454923.png)
7. ENJOY YOUR CURSED BOATSSS
